title: Kidplokio DIY Build Dinosaur Robot Assembly Toy Figure Play Set Boys Ages 3+
description:
Perfect for any Jurassic Journey into make-believe this Assemble Dinosaur World STEM Dinosaur Kit features 4 different prehistoric creatures - the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops. All dinos can be assembled and disassembled easily with the provided screws and child-size grip screwdrivers. Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this DIY take apart dinosaur kit, but he or she will also be developing and improving their hand-eye coordination, dexterity, and fine motor skills while encouraging creativity and imagination through playtime

Kidplokio DIY Build Dinosaur Robot Assembly Toy Figure Play Set Boys Ages 3+

Perfect for any Jurassic Journey into make-believe this Assemble Dinosaur World STEM Dinosaur Kit features 4 different prehistoric creatures - the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops. All dinos can be assembled and disassembled easily with the provided screws and child-size grip screwdrivers. Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this DIY take apart dinosaur kit, but he or she will also be developing and improving their hand-eye coordination, dexterity, and fine motor skills while encouraging creativity and imagination through playtime.

Key Features

  • STEM DINOSAUR PRETEND PLAY SET: This DIY take apart Dinosaur Toy Set offers hours of entertainment while your budding paleontologist assembles and disassembles 4 different prehistoric creatures, the Tyrannosaurus Rex, Acanthosaurus, Macrosaurus, and Triceratops. Each unique dinosaur can easily be disassembled using either of the 2 provided screwdrivers to unscrew multiple parts of the dinosaur.
  • EDUCATIONAL TOYS: The Assemble Dinosaur World Toy is a great beginner engineering dinosaur pretend play set for kids. A perfect blend of engaging fun and education, it can help children improve their problem solving skills, hand eye coordination, and fine motor skills.
  • EASY ASSEMBLY WITH MOVEABLE PARTS: With large screws and kid’s size screwdriver, taking apart and rebuilding these prehistoric creatures is a breeze. Once fully assembled, these dinosaurs can be repositioned by moving their heads, neck, legs, and tails. This allows kids to simulate dinosaur movements, enrich their imagination and take part in storytelling with their prehistoric pals.
  • DURABLE, SAFE CONSTRUCTION: Made of high-quality, non-toxic ABS plastic, these durable dinosaurs are built to withstand hours of assembly and play time. Kids will enjoy unlimited hours of creative fun without worry of these STEM-learning dinosaurs breaking. These dino toys are also an excellent addition to any preschool or kindergarten classroom.
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Non-toxic ABS plastic; Colors: Assorted; Pieces: 4 Dinosaurs and 2 screwdrivers; Safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLDPST6PC
  • UPC: 810058481405
  • Size: 6pc

Other take-apart toys are complicated and frustrating, but your child will be sure to thrive with the easy and intuitive assembly of the Kidplokio Dino STEM toyset with parts that fit seamlessly together. Once fully assembled these dinosaurs can be repositioned by moving their heads, neck, legs, and tails, which allows kids to simulate dinosaur movements, enrich their imagination and take part in storytelling with their prehistoric pals!

Made of high-quality, non-toxic ABS plastic these durable dinosaurs are built to withstand hours of assembly and playtime. Kids will enjoy unlimited hours of creative fun without worrying about these STEM-learning dinosaurs breaking. They are also an excellent addition to any preschool or kindergarten classroom. Make sure to grab one of these sets for your child who is obsessed with dinosaurs! They are also great gifts for birthdays, holidays, and dino-themed parties!
